title: RESOLUTION 1 — Sara invites Eva
prompt: Medium two-shot in @dream-house. @Sara on the LEFT sits cross-legged on the rug holding two dolls. @Eva on the RIGHT stands hopefully nearby. Sara (gentle, warm): "Eva — come play with me?" Eva (eyes lighting up): "REALLY?!" Sara (smiling, scooting over): "Really, really, really!" Warm afternoon light.
